sn21.9:1.0.1: Sāvatthiyaṁ vihārati. Atha kho āyasmā tisso bhagavato pitucchāputto yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi dukkhī dummano assūni pavattayamāno. Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ tissaṁ etadavoca:
sn21.9:1.0.2: Idamavoca bhagavā. Idaṁ vatvāna sugato athāparaṁ etadavoca satthā:
